name: BTC Value Reacceptance Exhaustion v1
edge_mechanism: mean reversion from exhaustion only when structure reaccepts prior value
thesis: BTC 4h is the best similar-asset lane for testing whether an exhaustion push becomes tradable only after price reaccepts prior value rather than while still extending. The edge is the structure reclaim after exhaustion, not raw oversold/overbought readings.
invalidation_condition: Abort if exhaustion-plus-reacceptance remains too sparse or if reclaimed moves do not mean-revert far enough after costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price stretches away from value, shows exhaustion, reaccepts prior structure, and rotates back toward the center of range.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: In hard chop, extension alone is not enough. Reacceptance into value filters out many one-way trends and focuses on repair moves back toward balance.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: BTC 4h gives enough structure for exhaustion and reacceptance to matter without the noise of very fast lanes.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: Markets can reaccept value briefly and then stall, leaving too little rotation distance after fees.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If density is acceptable but travel is weak, shorten profit objectives before tightening exhaustion thresholds.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: A steady set of repair trades with mean-reversion expectancy concentrated in first and second targets.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: BTC 4h plus one cross-lane show credible density and positive repair travel after reacceptance.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, sparse trade count, or reaccepted moves that fail to rotate enough.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; exhaustion, reacceptance, and trend-avoidance are complementary
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by avoiding exact candle-pattern requirements

test_lanes.why_included: Best lane for value-reacceptance mean reversion on a liquid major.
test_lanes.continue_if: Repair moves occur often enough and mean-revert after costs.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: Reacceptance is too sparse or travel is too shallow.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Exhaustion pushes that reclaim value and rotate back toward the middle of range.

test_lanes.why_included: Checks whether the same structure-repair mechanism survives on ETH.
test_lanes.continue_if: ETH shows similar repair behavior with acceptable density.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Comparable but slightly noisier reacceptance repairs.

test_lanes.why_included: Tests whether the same logic survives on a more explosive asset without becoming too unstable.
test_lanes.continue_if: TAO still produces structured repairs instead of chaos.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: TAO volatility destroys the repair thesis.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Fewer but larger repair rotations than BTC.

long: Exit remaining 20% on touch of EMA_55 or 5 bars
short: Exit remaining 20% on touch of EMA_55 or 5 bars
